assignments.name: account

parameters.content:
## Accounting Audit Log Workflow

Sichere Audit-Logging für alle Accounting-Operationen mit:
- Security-Logging
- Rate-Limiting
- Client-Fingerprinting
- Audit-Trail

parameters.jsCode:
// Support email template const data = $input.first().json; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: 'Support Request Received - Keymoji 🆘', html: `

Support Request Received

Hi there! 📧

We've received your support request and will get back to you soon.

Request Details:

  • Subject: {{ data.data.subject || 'Support Request' }}
  • Priority: {{ data.data.priority || 'Normal' }}
  • Ticket ID: {{ data.data.ticketId || 'N/A' }}

We typically respond within 24 hours.

Thank you for your patience!

Best regards,
The Keymoji Support Team

`, text: `Support request received. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.` }; return { json: emailData };

// Payment email template const data = $input.first().json; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: 'Payment Received - Keymoji Pro 💳', html: `

Payment Confirmed!

Hi there! ✅

We've received your payment for Keymoji Pro.

Payment Details:

  • Amount: ${{ data.data.amount || '9.99' }}
  • Plan: Keymoji Pro
  • Date: {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString() }}

Your subscription is now active!

Access Pro Features

Best regards,
The Keymoji Team

`, text: `Payment confirmed for Keymoji Pro. Your subscription is now active!` }; return { json: emailData };

// Subscription email template const data = $input.first().json; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: 'Your Keymoji Subscription is Active! ⭐', html: `

Subscription Activated!

Hi there! 🎉

Your Keymoji Pro subscription is now active!

You now have access to:

  • Unlimited emoji generation
  • Advanced analytics
  • Story mode (coming soon)
  • Priority support

Thank you for supporting Keymoji!

Start Using Pro Features

Best regards,
The Keymoji Team

`, text: `Your Keymoji Pro subscription is now active! Enjoy unlimited emoji generation and advanced features.` }; return { json: emailData };

// Welcome email template const data = $input.first().json; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: 'Welcome to Keymoji! 🎉', html: `

Welcome to Keymoji!

Hi there! 👋

Thank you for joining Keymoji - the fun and secure emoji password generator!

With Keymoji, you can:

  • Generate secure emoji passwords
  • Create memorable passphrases
  • Stay safe online with unique combinations

Start generating your first emoji password now!

Get Started

Best regards,
The Keymoji Team

`, text: `Welcome to Keymoji! Thank you for joining us. Start generating secure emoji passwords at https://keymoji.wtf` }; return { json: emailData };
